_readme: Copy this file to <slug>.json to publish a story. Files starting with _ are ignored.
Put the images in src/assets/photos/editorial/<slug>/ — the slug must match.
(src/assets, not public/ — that's what lets Astro resize them and emit avif/webp.)
photos: a string is a full-width plate; an array of two is a side-by-side diptych.
Any photo may be written as { "file": "x.jpg", "alt": "what is in the frame" } instead
of a bare filename. Always describe the image — alt text is what a blind visitor gets.
dateSort: any sortable string (YYYY-MM). Controls order on the index, newest first.
credits: role/name pairs. Add an optional url to link a collaborator.
title: Story Title
note: One optional line of context. Delete this key if the images speak for themselves.

photos.alt: Describe what is in the frame.
